reviews.review_description: So far it's been pretty good, I haven't completed a night yet, I'm sure I'm missing something, but I'd grabbed it on sale awhile back and wasted a few hours in it. We'll worth your time.

I love the game that graphics is brilliant it's excellent can't wait to see more entities That's all I could idea New stations different rooms that will be so cool cuz I love where you going with this your mechanics is totally different from all the other ones I played when you get interact in the game I love it that makes it more funner and more scarier when you can interact in the game the way you did it can't wait to the update comes and more entities and more rooms and different situations keep up the good work you got something going here Don't give up

developer_response.body:
Thank you! Yes I plan to continue adding and updating the game over the next year. I definitely will have some different entities and I love the idea of seeing when he's near from under the covers - so stay tuned!
If this kind of game vibes with people, I might even add new rooms and whole new situations (but still the same core gameplay)

reviews.review_title: 😱 Stay Alert or Don’t Survive the night
reviews.review_description:
The 7th Night is a chilling lying-down experience where survival depends entirely on your awareness. You’re confined to your bed, and your only goal is to make it through seven increasingly unsettling nights by spotting the anomalies creeping into your room.

It’s a clever mix of tension and vulnerability—closing your eyes won’t save you, and hiding under the covers only buys you moments of safety. The atmosphere builds beautifully, turning every small sound or shift in the dark into a genuine threat.

A simple concept executed with precision, delivering a deeply immersive and unnerving horror experience. Keep your cool… if you can. 👁️
